tuning: E A D G B E
content:
**************************************
First Tab So Any Feedback Would Be Awesome

Based off Noah's performance on IG Live

(Link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2rHxqVoeOr8)

Strumming is easy to figure out from the live.

[tab]Special Chords:    [ch]D/A[/ch]   [ch]D6/A[/ch]  [ch]E/B[/ch]
                e|-----|-----|-----|
                B|-----|-----|-----|
                G|-(2)-|--4--|-----|
                D|--4--|--4--|--6--|
                A|--5--|--5--|--7--|
                E|--5--|--5--|--7--|
**************************************[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
As you promised me that I was more than all the miles combined you must've[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
had yourself a change of heart like half way through the drive because your[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
voice trailed off exactly as you passed my exit sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Kept on driving straight and left my future to the right[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
Now I am stuck between my anger and the blame that I can't face and[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]
memories of something even smoking weed can't replace and I am[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
terrified of weather 'cause I see you when it rains[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
and doc told me to travel but there's Covid on the planes[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
Now I am fucked, I'm fucked, and I suck,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F#m[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]
and you suck, and this sucks, yeah I'm fucked[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
And I love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  saw your mom and she forgot that I existed and it's[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   half my fault but I'm just playin' to be the victim[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/A[/ch]
I'll drink alcohol till my friends come home for Christmas and I'll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  dream each night of some version of you that I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  might not have but I did not lose, now I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   tire tracks and one pair of shoes and I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]E/B[/ch]
   split in half but that'll have to do[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D/A[/ch] [ch]D6/A[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
Was I wrong to think that putting something good on all my bad[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]
might've cancelled out the darkness that I got from mom and dad[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
and I am scared of being funny 'cause I miss the way you laugh[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D/A[/ch]
you once called me forever, now you will not call me back[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
And I love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  saw your mom, she forgot that I existed and it's[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   half my fault but I'm just scared to play the victim[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/A[/ch]
I'll drink alcohol until my friends come home for Christmas and I'll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  dream each night of some version of you that I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  might not have but I did not lose, now you're[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   tire tracks and one pair of shoes and I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]D/A[/ch]                         [ch]E/B[/ch]
   split in half but that'll have to do[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 4]
[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
You promised me that I was more than all the miles combined, you must've[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
had yourself a change of heart like half way through the drive because your[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F#m[/ch]
voice trailed off exactly as you passed my exit sign[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
You kept on driving straight and left our future to the right[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause I love Vermont but it's the season of the sticks and I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  saw your mom and she forgot that I existed and it's[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   half my fault but I just like to play the victim[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'll drink alcohol till my friends come home for Christmas and I'll[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  dream each night of some version of you that I[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  might not have but one I did not lose, now I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   tire tracks and one pair of shoes and I'm[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]
  split in half but that'll have to do[/tab]

[ch]A[/ch]
